title: calochortus luteus var. vestae
intro: Calochortus luteus var. vestae, also known as Mariposa Lily, is a rare and exotic species of flowering plant that belongs to the lily family. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Calochortus luteus var. vestae include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Calochortus luteus var. vestae typically involve drying and powdering the roots and flowers, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves.
